companyInfo.title: Company Info and Contact
companyInfo.description: Apex Comics Universe, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Horizon Media Corporation, is one of the world's most prominent character-based entertainment companies, built on a proven library of more than 5,000 characters featured in a variety of media over thirty years. Apex utilizes its character franchises in entertainment, licensing and publishing. For more information visit apexcomics.com.
